name: Shenzhen TXD Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen TXD Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research, design, development, production, and sale of liquid crystal display module products for private enterprises. It offers TFT liquid crystal display modules, touch display integrated modules, camera modules, AMOLED, full screen, and other products that are used in mobile phones, tablet computers, digital cameras, Medical equipment display, instrumentation, vehicle display, and other fields. The company sells its products in China, Hong Kong, Macau, and Taiwan. Shenzhen TXD Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
